schemeSubCategory.value: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend
schemeSubCategory.label: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend

nodalDepartmentName.label: Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme provides a cash award of ₹20,000/- to the top 10 writers from Adi Dravidar, Tribal, or Adi Dravidar communities converted to Christianity, with one additional spot for a writer from other communities.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The “Award of ₹20,000/- to Best Writers” scheme by the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department, Tamil Nadu, aimed at recognizing and promoting literary talent within the Adi Dravidar, Tribal, and Adi Dravidar Christian-converted communities. A total of 10 writers from these communities will be selected to receive a cash prize. Additionally, one writer from any other community will also be chosen.
<br>
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Cash Prize:** ₹20,000/- to each of the selected writers (10 from Adi Dravidar/Tribal communities and one from other communities). - **Recognition:** Selected writers receive state recognition for their literary contributions.

children.text: The “Award of ₹20,000/- to Best Writers” scheme by the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department, Tamil Nadu, aimed at recognizing and promoting literary talent within the Adi Dravidar, Tribal, and Adi Dravidar Christian-converted communities. A total of 10 writers from these communities will be selected to receive a cash prize. Additionally, one writer from any other community will also be chosen.
₹20,000/- to each of the selected writers (10 from Adi Dravidar/Tribal communities and one from other communities).
Selected writers receive state recognition for their literary contributions.
The scheme will be advertised in newspapers during April/May.
Interested candidates must submit their literary works along with the required documents to the designated authority as mentioned in the advertisement.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
- The beneficiary should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.
  - The beneficiary should be an unemployed writer.
  - The beneficiary should belong to the Adi Dravidar/ Tribal/ Adi Dravidar converted to Christian community.

children.text: The beneficiary should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.
The beneficiary should be an unemployed writer.
The beneficiary should belong to the Adi Dravidar/ Tribal/ Adi Dravidar converted to Christian community.
